message:
fix(codegen): Reduce monomorphization in Fraction, comparison, and dunder dispatch

Move Fraction struct to runtime to eliminate 700-char inline struct emission:
- NEW: packages/runtime/src/Objects/fraction.zig - runtime Fraction type
- UPDATE: src/codegen/native/fractions_mod.zig - use runtime.Fraction

Add container_dispatch helpers to centralize @typeInfo checks:
- isSlice(T) - check if type is a slice (for is/is not comparisons)
- hasPtrChildDecl(T, name) - check if pointer child has declaration (for dunder dispatch)

Clean up comparison.zig:
- Remove unused @typeInfo(@TypeOf(__right)) that still caused monomorphization
- Use container_dispatch.isSlice() for slice identity checks

These changes reduce @typeInfo patterns and inline struct emission across all tests.
Part of ongoing monomorphization reduction for batch compilation performance.
